title: Highlighter V2
description: Highlights items in your inventory different colors depending on their enchantments and types.
body:
![İmage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/485294cdc3721acffbcf1fff006faa6b552e04a2.png)ING

Highlights items in your inventory different colors depending on their enchantments (ex. piercing vs multishot) or type (ex. totems)

TR

Envanterinizdeki eşyaları, büyülerine (örneğin delici veya çoklu atış) veya türlerine (örneğin totemler) bağlı olarak farklı renklerle vurgular.

Metky

Credits

themasterkitty
